mapper.sql: id, permission_name, permission_code, description, type, parent_id, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_permission ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.permission_name, p.permission_code, p.description, p.type, p.parent_id, p.sort_order, p.status, p.create_time, p.update_time FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.permission_name, p.permission_code, p.description, p.type, p.parent_id, p.sort_order, p.status, p.create_time, p.update_time FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.id ASC
SELECT FROM sys_permission WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_permission (permission_name, permission_code, description, type, parent_id, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{permissionName}, #{permissionCode}, #{description}, #{type, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{parentId, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sortOrder, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, NOW(), NOW())
